# updateNodeAtPath

Execute the updateNodeAtPath mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk update-node-at-path --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.dbId <UUID> --input.root <UUID> --input.path <String> --input.data <JSON> --input.kids <UUID> --input.ktree <String>
```
